specific_question: What percentage of vehicles sold by Elexion Automotive in North America complied with the Motor Vehicle Safety Oversight Program?
answer: All of Elexion Automotive's cars sold in North America comply with the Motor Vehicle Safety Oversight Program, according to an internal audit conducted on January 1, 2023.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
